zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia Haget於1138年出生在英國時，她的父親Bertram Haget33歲，母親Agnes39歲。她於1158年與Peter FitzToret在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 白 奧斯維斯崔結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1205年在英國史洛普爾享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Haget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pagett
meanings: English: variant of   Paget   or   Padgett  .

variants.name: Page
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia Haget was born in 1138, in England, her father, Bertram Haget, was 33 and her mother, Agnes, was 39. She married Peter FitzToret in 1158, in Moreton by Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1205, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 67.

ko.Moreton by Oswestry, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스w스트리
ko.Moreton Toret, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스w스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Lucia Haget(이)가 1138년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bertram Haget(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스w스트리에서 Peter FitzToret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1205년 영국 슈럽실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia Haget родилась в 1138 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Bertram Haget было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter FitzToret в 1158 г. в местности моретон би освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1205 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.
